config.string: Connection lost. Click anywhere on the screen to reconnect.
Session timeout. Please re-open the game.
Server error. Please reload the game.
Restore session. The session data crashed. All the crucial information saved. Please reload the page.
Internal error. Please reload the game.
Please, refill your balance to place a bet.
Bets were reduced to match your balance.
Bet parameters were modified. Bet is set to default.
Oops! Something went wrong. But it's ok, we've fixed it. Please continue playing.
Bonus Game finished.
Continue to Base Game.
Sorry, this game is not available in your country.
Game limit reached.
You have reached the wager limit.
You have reached your wager limit.
Current bet exceeds your credits. To place more chips, please refill your balance.
NOT ENOUGH MONEY ON YOUR BALANCE.
We hope you enjoyed our games, if you wish to continue the fun please proceed to the Cashier.
Fatal error.
Close
Deposit
